property.name: componentTitle
property.label: Component Title
property.description: Optional heading displayed above the records.

property.name: displayMode
property.label: Display Mode
property.description: How records are displayed.

property.name: objectApiName
property.label: Object API Name
property.description: API name of the Salesforce object to query (e.g. Account, Grant__c).

property.name: fieldList
property.label: Fields to Display (CSV)
property.description: Comma-separated field API names to show (e.g. Name,Status__c,Amount__c).

property.name: primaryField
property.label: Primary / Title Field
property.description: Field API name used as the bold title on each card or grid item (e.g. Name).

property.name: imageUrlField
property.label: Image URL Field (Grid View)
property.description: Field API name whose value is an image URL for the grid view background.

property.name: whereClause
property.label: WHERE Clause Filter
property.description: Optional SOQL WHERE body to filter records (e.g. Status__c = 'Active'). Admin-configured only.

property.name: orderByField
property.label: ORDER BY Field
property.description: Field API name to sort records by (e.g. Name, CreatedDate).

property.name: orderByDirection
property.label: Sort Direction
property.description: Sort direction for ORDER BY field.

property.name: recordsPerPage
property.label: Records Per Page
property.description: Number of records loaded per page (increments of this value on Load More). Default: 10.

property.name: colorTheme
property.label: Color Theme
property.description: Select a preset color theme. Custom hex values below will override the selected theme.

property.name: accentColor
property.label: Accent Color (Hex)
property.description: Custom hex color for buttons, borders, and highlights (e.g. #0070D2). Overrides theme.

property.name: headerBgColor
property.label: Header Background Color (Hex)
property.description: Custom hex color for the component header and card title bars (e.g. #032D60). Overrides theme.

property.name: cardBgColor
property.label: Card Background Color (Hex)
property.description: Custom hex color for card, list row, and grid backgrounds (e.g. #F0F8FF). Overrides theme.

property.name: textColor
property.label: Text Color (Hex)
property.description: Custom hex color for body text (e.g. #1A1A1A). Overrides theme.

property.name: overlayBgColor
property.label: Grid Overlay Background Color (Hex)
property.description: Background color of the image overlay in grid view (e.g. #000000).

property.name: overlayTextColor
property.label: Grid Overlay Text Color (Hex)
property.description: Text color for the record name shown over the image overlay (e.g. #FFFFFF).

property.name: overlayOpacity
property.label: Grid Overlay Opacity (0–100)
property.description: Opacity of the image overlay as a percentage. 0 = transparent, 100 = fully opaque.

property.name: overlayDirection
property.label: Grid Overlay Direction
property.description: Overlay style: gradient from bottom-to-top or solid full-cover.

property.name: badgeFields
property.label: Badge Fields (CSV)
property.description: Comma-separated field API names to render as colored badge pills (e.g. Status__c,Type).

property.name: badgeColorMap
property.label: Badge Color Overrides
property.description: Optional value-to-color map for badges. Format: Active=#2E7D32,Closed=#C2185B,Pending=#E65100. Overrides auto-color.

property.name: badgeStyle
property.label: Badge Style
property.description: Filled: solid colored background with white text. Outlined: colored border and text on white background.
